title: Haunting photos show 'UFO' Biden admin used $500,000 missile to shoot down... what it turned out to be was far more 'embarrassing'
description: In February 2023, F-16s scrambled to confront an octagonal object hovering 20,000 feet above Lake Huron in Michigan before blasting it from the sky with an AIM-9 Sidewinder missile.

title: ‘UFO’ Shot Down Over Lake Huron Was Actually a Boy Scout Balloon, Former US Officials Reveal
description: What was once treated as a potential UFO threat over Lake Huron may have been nothing more than a Boy Scout research balloon, according to former US government officials who say the military's response was influenced by the fallout from the Chinese spy balloon incident.
